description: Build an OEL/WEL/PEL-linked chemical hazard and exposure register, organised by similar-exposure group (SEG), banding each exposure with the risk matrix and flagging where health surveillance or air monitoring is due. Use it to build a chemical exposure register, link agents to occupational exposure limits, assess inhalation/dermal exposure risk by SEG, or plan a monitoring schedule. Every limit is cited with its source and year; controls are hierarchy-of-controls ranked; worker exposure data is de-identified to role/SEG labels before drafting. Decision-support only; a competent person (e.g. occupational hygienist) must review the output.
name: chemical-exposure-register
